nameJa: 国民健康保険料（税）領収証書（写し）
conditionNote: Submit if enrolled in National Health Insurance during any part of the past 2 years. Submit all receipts for the applicable period. If unable to submit, include a written explanation (理由書).
noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number. Confirm no missed or late payments.
noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。
